overview: A bio-identical hormone replacement therapy and weight loss clinic offering a functional medicine approach to address hormonal imbalances. The clinic provides personalized treatment plans combining hormone optimization with medical weight loss support across multiple Idaho locations.
highlights: Pellet therapy for sustained hormone delivery
GLP-1 weight loss injections, MIC fat-burning injections, and B12 shots
Comprehensive lab panels and InBody scale body composition analysis
targetAudience: Men and women experiencing hormonal imbalances, weight loss resistance, and age-related hormonal decline including low testosterone and menopause symptoms.
